summary: Working as a Senior Software Engineer developing enterprise sustainability SaaS products for Wood Mackenzie's Lens platform. I build scalable frontend applications, improve performance, implement reusable UI architecture, integrate GraphQL APIs, and deliver customer-facing features using modern web technologies.
responsibilities: Develop enterprise-scale frontend applications using React, TypeScript and Next.js.
Build reusable UI components and shared frontend architecture.
Develop and maintain GraphQL and REST API integrations.
Implement feature flags using LaunchDarkly for controlled feature releases.
Optimize application performance and user experience.
Collaborate with designers, product managers and backend engineers.
Write unit and end-to-end tests using Jest and Playwright.
Review code and follow engineering best practices.
Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and deployment improvements.
Participate in technical discussions and frontend architecture decisions.

projects.name: Wood Mackenzie Lens Platform
projects.description: Enterprise sustainability SaaS platform that helps organizations analyze energy, emissions and business data.
responsibilities: Develop customer-facing features.
Build reusable React components.
Integrate GraphQL APIs.
Improve frontend performance.
Implement LaunchDarkly feature flags.

achievements: Built scalable customer-facing enterprise SaaS features.
Improved application performance through frontend optimization.
Developed reusable frontend architecture for better maintainability.
Implemented LaunchDarkly feature flags for safer deployments.
Enhanced deployment workflow using CI/CD practices.

summary: Developed full-stack retail solutions including Point of Sale (POS) systems and e-commerce applications. Focused on building responsive user interfaces, backend APIs, business workflows and performance optimization.
responsibilities: Developed responsive React applications for retail businesses.
Built backend services using Node.js and Express.js.
Developed POS features including billing, inventory and payment workflows.
Built e-commerce applications using React and Next.js.
Integrated REST APIs with frontend applications.
Implemented authentication and authorization.
Optimized frontend performance and loading speed.
Ensured responsive layouts across desktop, tablet and mobile devices.
Worked closely with clients to deliver business requirements.

projects.name: POS Management System
projects.description: Retail Point of Sale application supporting billing, inventory management, payment processing and multi-store operations.

projects.name: Food Bazaar
projects.description: Modern e-commerce application built with Next.js, providing an optimized online shopping experience.

achievements: Received an Appreciation Award for improving application responsiveness across desktop, tablet and mobile devices.
Reduced page load time by approximately 40% through frontend performance optimization.
Delivered production-ready POS and e-commerce applications.
Built reusable frontend components that improved maintainability.

awards.name: Appreciation Award
awards.reason: Recognized for significantly improving application responsiveness across all devices and reducing page load time by approximately 40%.

summary: Developed healthcare web and mobile applications for hospitals and clinics. Worked on patient management systems, clinical workflows, REST APIs and React Native mobile applications.
responsibilities: Developed responsive healthcare web applications using React.
Built mobile applications using React Native for Android and iOS.
Developed backend REST APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
Implemented patient management and healthcare workflows.
Collaborated with QA engineers and product teams.
Improved application performance and reliability.
Maintained clean, reusable and scalable code.

projects.name: Healthcare Management System
projects.description: Web and mobile platform supporting hospitals, clinics, patient management and healthcare workflows.

achievements: Developed production-ready healthcare web and mobile applications.
Built REST APIs supporting healthcare workflows.
